safety_ph03.note: infra_files=1 is the reusable workflow YAML this WP is scoped to modify; no force-push token; GH_TOKEN never printed

completeness_ph04.note: the workflow change is covered by test_back_merge_step.py (6 static-assertion classes) + the relaxed byte-parity prefix check

architecture.note: no domain->infra import; bash steps single-responsibility; post-condition enforces atomicity invariant (NFR-006)

security.note: all GH expressions via env: ports (no shell-injection surface); GH_TOKEN only passed via env to gh, never echoed; zero force-push tokens (no destructive push)

quality.note: set -uo pipefail (intentional: captures push non-zero for raced fall-through); single-line grep-friendly logs; canonical strings sourced-parity with drift_check.sh; new behaviour fully tested
